headline: Welltower Inc (NYSE:WELL) Nears Breakout with Near-Perfect Technical and Setup Scores
summary: Welltower (WELL) scores a perfect 10 Technical Rating and 9 Setup Quality, forming a bull flag pattern with a tight consolidation zone. This healthcare REIT shows strong upward momentum with a suggested buy stop at $217.36 and tight risk management.
